input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule VE.3.1.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ve.3.1.2
            TITLE: flame resistant material

            CONTENT:
            rule VE.3.1.2: Flame Resistant Material
VE.3.1.2 Flame Resistant Material 
For this section some, but not all, of the approved materials are: Carbon X, Indura, Nomex, 
Polybenzimidazole (common name PBI) and Proban.

final_answer: rule VE.3.1.2: Flame Resistant Material VE.3.1.2 Flame Resistant Material For this section some, but not all, of the approved materials are: Carbon X, Indura, Nomex, Polybenzimidazole (common name PBI) and Proban.
